result.topicName: React reconciliation and virtual DOM diffing algorithm

answers.5: This hampers the reacts diffing algorithm. React uses the keys to keep track of what needs to be updated and reconcile. When we use index and an element is inserted at the top or in-between. React diffing algorithm treats it as the same element and does not reconcile rather inserts an element at the end. If the right key is used, it would, rather carefully add the element at the given place and renders everything below
answers.6:
In the React fiber architecture each component is denoted by a JS object, these object have a field called alternate which is used to store the reference to its counterpart. There are 2 trees the WIP and Current Tree. If the WIP tree node has alternate as null then the entire component needs to be rendered. In case there is a component already present, then its reference is stored here.

Depending on the priority lane? Fast,  Medium, Slow. These fibers can be paused and its WIP data is stored in the object. And resumed when the lanes are free. This allows double buffering.
